top_signals.title: Galaxy scores New York BitLicense to offer digital asset services in the state
top_signals.summary: Mike Novogratz' Galaxy Digital said the approval expands its regulatory footprint to more than 50 licenses worldwide.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
